ir:
recipe.module @studio_wall {
  %wall_len = recipe.param "wall_len", 6000.0
  %wall_t = recipe.param "wall_t", 300.0
  %wall_h = recipe.param "wall_h", 3000.0
  %win_w = recipe.param "win_w", 1500.0
  %win_h = recipe.param "win_h", 1200.0
  %sill_h = recipe.param "sill_h", 900.0
  %door_w = recipe.param "door_w", 900.0
  %door_h = recipe.param "door_h", 2100.0
  %door_off = recipe.param "door_off", 600.0
  %col_r = recipe.param "col_r", 150.0
  %col_h = recipe.param "col_h", 2800.0
  %col_n = recipe.param "col_n", 3.0
  %col_gap = recipe.param "col_gap", 2000.0
  %fillet_r = recipe.param "fillet_r", 20.0
  %free = expr.sub %wall_len, %win_w
  %win_x = expr.div %free, 2.0
  %door_hc = expr.add %door_h, 1.0
  %wall0 = geom.box %wall_len, %wall_t, %wall_h
  %win_box = geom.box %win_w, 500.0, %win_h
  %win_cut = geom.translate %win_box, [%win_x, -100.0, %sill_h]
  %wall1 = geom.difference %wall0, %win_cut
  %door_box = geom.box %door_w, 500.0, %door_hc
  %door_cut = geom.translate %door_box, [%door_off, -100.0, -1.0]
  %wall = geom.difference %wall1, %door_cut
  recipe.export %wall, "wall"
  %col = geom.cylinder %col_r, %col_h
  %cols = geom.repeat_x %col, %col_n, %col_gap
  %colonnade = geom.translate %cols, [1000.0, 1200.0, 0.0]
  recipe.export %colonnade, "colonnade"
  %ped0 = geom.box 800.0, 800.0, 450.0
  %ped1 = geom.fillet %ped0, %fillet_r
  %pedestal = geom.translate %ped1, [2600.0, 1900.0, 0.0]
  recipe.export %pedestal, "pedestal"
}
